returns a VALIDATION_ERROR envelope with field details on invalid create
rejects a connection with an invalid token (CR4)
rejects publishing when the local flag is true but no OAuth account exists
creates a product and returns 201 with the success envelope
enforces workspace byte and file quotas before writing another image
rejects malformed detail topology: target children contradict leafness
fails closed before a live publish when required OLX details are missing
POST /listings/:idB/publish -> 404 (no cross-tenant publish)
stores a hash of state and consumes the context exactly once
maps OLX remote status limited to local status live
rejects flat taxonomy with a noncanonical parent id
logs in with valid credentials and returns a token
reports stubbed=false when a real (non-stub) transport is used
does not serialize arbitrary properties or non-Error values
maps nullable columns to null
rejects relisting a draft listing before quota authorization or enqueueing
rejects an empty image
returns a structured guard error when the OLX quota guard is unavailable
